source_record.title: Plasma Cell Neoplasms (Including Multiple Myeloma) Treatment (PDQ) - Health Professional Version.
source_record.study_context: Public NCI PDQ health-professional summary used to extract disease-burden, disease-site, high-risk, and relapsed/refractory context fields for public mechanism-map navigation. This record does not use patient data and does not make treatment, trial, prognosis, or eligibility recommendations.

extracted_signals.signal_summary: The PDQ staging section supports preserving public disease-burden and stage-context fields such as M protein measurements, hemoglobin, calcium, lytic bone lesions, renal function, LDH, beta-2-microglobulin, albumin, and R-ISS context.
measurement_fields: M protein in serum or urine
International Staging System or Revised International Staging System context
limitations: Staging context is not a direct relapse mechanism.
This extraction does not estimate patient prognosis.
Use only as public context-field guidance before mechanism comparison.

extracted_signals.signal_summary: The PDQ summary supports preserving high-risk cytogenetic context from interphase FISH or cytogenetic testing before comparing relapse-mechanism artifacts.
limitations: Risk groups are context fields, not causal mechanism assignments.
The PDQ notes that some genetic-risk stratification comes from retrospective analyses and requires prospective validation.
This extraction does not recommend risk-adapted treatment.

extracted_signals.signal_summary: The PDQ summary distinguishes multiple lesions of bone, isolated plasmacytoma of bone, extramedullary plasmacytoma, and extramedullary tumor sampling context, supporting public extraction of disease-site fields.
limitations: Disease-site fields are context variables and should not be converted into mechanism frequency claims.
This extraction does not provide imaging interpretation or diagnostic guidance.
Source definitions must be preserved before harmonizing across artifacts.

extracted_signals.signal_summary: The PDQ relapsed or refractory section supports preserving disease-state and prior-treatment context fields, including relapse timing, refractory status, and prior therapy-class exposure, while keeping treatment options separate from recommendations.
limitations: Treatment-option lists are not treatment recommendations.
This extraction does not rank sequences or products.
This extraction does not infer trial eligibility, access, efficacy, safety, or patient fit.

what_this_supports: Disease burden, disease site, high-risk, prior-therapy, and disease-state context fields now have a second public source-specific extraction record.
Public mechanism-map records should preserve context fields before comparing relapse-mechanism buckets.
NCI PDQ context fields can help define extraction labels while remaining separate from clinical recommendations.
what_this_does_not_support: It does not prove any context field causes relapse.
It does not provide patient-specific diagnosis, prognosis, treatment guidance, trial guidance, eligibility guidance, or monitoring guidance.
It does not rank relapse mechanisms, therapy classes, products, trials, or access paths.
It does not establish a cure claim.

review_notes: Built from the public NCI PDQ health-professional summary accessed on 2026-04-15.
Created to complete disease-burden-site-risk-context-second-source-extraction-task-v0 as second-source coverage for disease-context fields.
Use this record for source-defined context fields only, not clinical interpretation.
